# 2026K Accumulated Run Challenge

## Event Overview

The **2026K Accumulated Run Challenge** is a year-long virtual running challenge where participants aim to complete a total of **2,026 kilometres** within the year 2026.

This event is designed for runners, walkers, joggers, hikers, and fitness enthusiasts who want to build consistency, track progress, and finish the year with a major personal achievement.

Participants may complete the distance gradually through daily, weekly, or monthly activities.

---

## Event Name

**2026K Accumulated Run Challenge**

---

## Event Type

Virtual Run Challenge  
Accumulated Distance Event

---

## Target Distance

**2,026 kilometres**

---

## Event Duration

**Start Date:** January 1, 2026  
**End Date:** December 31, 2026

---

## Registration Period

**Registration Opens:** May 8, 2026  
**Registration Closes:** May 31, 2026

Since the event officially started on January 1, 2026, participants who register during the registration period may include valid activities completed from January 1, 2026 onward, as long as they can provide proof.

---

## Who Can Join

This challenge is open to:

- Recreational runners
- Walkers
- Joggers
- Hikers
- Running clubs
- Fitness groups
- Students and professionals
- Anyone who wants to complete 2,026 km within 2026

---

## How the Challenge Works

Participants must accumulate a total of **2,026 km** from January 1 to December 31, 2026.

Activities do not need to be completed in one session.

For example:

- 5 km per day
- 40 km per week
- 169 km per month
- Any flexible running schedule that reaches 2,026 km by December 31, 2026

The key goal is consistency.

---

## Accepted Activities

The following activities are accepted:

- Outdoor running
- Indoor treadmill running
- Walking
- Jogging
- Hiking
- Trail running

Cycling, swimming, and other non-foot-based activities are not accepted.

---

## Activity Proof Requirements

Participants must submit proof of activity using screenshots from fitness tracking apps such as:

- Strava
- Garmin Connect
- Nike Run Club
- Adidas Running
- Samsung Health
- Apple Fitness
- Coros
- Suunto
- Other apps that clearly show the required details

Each proof must show:

- Distance completed
- Date of activity
- Duration or moving time
- Activity type
- Participant name or app profile, if available

---

## Submission Rules

Participants may submit activities:

- Daily
- Weekly
- Monthly
- After every completed run or walk

Each submission must be clear and readable.

Duplicate submissions are not allowed.

Edited, manipulated, or suspicious screenshots may be rejected.

---

## Distance Tracking

The total accumulated distance will be based on approved submissions only.

For example:

| Submission | Distance |
|---|---:|
| Run 1 | 5 km |
| Run 2 | 10 km |
| Walk 1 | 3 km |
| Total Approved Distance | 18 km |

Participants must reach **2,026 km** on or before **December 31, 2026** to complete the challenge.

---

## Completion Requirement

To be considered a finisher, a participant must:

- Register within the official registration period
- Submit valid proof of activities
- Accumulate at least **2,026 km**
- Complete the challenge by **December 31, 2026**
- Follow all event rules

---

## Finisher Recognition

Participants who complete the challenge may receive:

- Digital finisher certificate
- Digital badge or medal
- Leaderboard recognition
- Finisher status on the platform

Optional physical rewards may include:

- Medal
- Shirt
- Patch
- Finisher kit

This depends on the final event package.

---

## Leaderboard Rules

The leaderboard may rank participants based on:

- Total approved distance
- Date of completion
- Number of valid submissions
- Consistency throughout the year

Participants who go beyond 2,026 km may still continue submitting activities for recognition.

---

## Important Rules

- The challenge runs from **January 1 to December 31, 2026**.
- Registration is open from **May 8 to May 31, 2026** only.
- Backdated activities from January 1, 2026 are accepted if valid proof is provided.
- Only foot-based activities are accepted.
- Screenshots must be readable and authentic.
- One activity may only be submitted once.
- The organiser reserves the right to reject suspicious, unclear, or invalid submissions.
- Participants are responsible for their own safety during all activities.
- Participants may complete the challenge anywhere.

---

## Suggested Monthly Target

To complete 2,026 km within the year, participants may aim for around:

| Target | Suggested Distance |
|---|---:|
| Per Month | 169 km |
| Per Week | 39 km |
| Per Day | 5.55 km |

Since registration begins on May 8, 2026, late registrants may need to submit valid previous activities or increase their weekly target.

---

## Sample Event Description

The **2026K Accumulated Run Challenge** is a year-long virtual run designed to help participants stay active, consistent, and motivated throughout 2026.

Your goal is simple: complete **2,026 km** from January 1 to December 31, 2026.

You can run, walk, jog, hike, or do treadmill sessions at your own pace, in your own place, and on your own schedule. Submit your activity proofs, track your progress, and work your way toward becoming an official 2026K finisher.

This is not about finishing fast.

It is about showing up consistently.

---
